mapper.select: SELECT id, unit_id, user_id, attendance_date, check_in_time, check_out_time, check_in_address, check_out_address, check_in_latitude, check_in_longitude, check_in_distance_meters, check_in_result, check_in_fail_reason, valid_flag, create_time FROM attendance_record WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, unit_id, location_name, latitude, longitude, radius_meters, address, status, create_time, create_time AS update_time FROM attendance_location WHERE unit_id = #{unitId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE attendance_record SET unit_id = #{unitId}, user_id = #{userId}, attendance_date = #{attendanceDate}, check_in_time = #{checkInTime}, check_out_time = #{checkOutTime}, check_in_address = #{checkInAddress}, check_out_address = #{checkOutAddress}, check_in_latitude = #{checkInLatitude}, check_in_longitude = #{checkInLongitude}, check_in_distance_meters = #{checkInDistanceMeters}, check_in_result = #{checkInResult}, check_in_fail_reason = #{checkInFailReason}, valid_flag = #{validFlag} WHERE id = #{id}
